name: zsnd_preinitialize_runtime_state
description: zSnd_PreInitializeRuntimeState performs one-time sound runtime reset, CD defaults, option binding, mute depth, and backend-handle preservation/reset by backend type.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /MD /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 COFF byte compare currently fails for zSnd_PreInitializeRuntimeState: 124 unmasked mismatches after masking 152 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 270 bytes and the VC object body is 304 bytes with 1 trailing VC NOP trimmed.

The reviewed byte drift is initialization ordering/control-flow shape around backend reset, CD defaults, and option lookup binding; the native smoke verifies one-time return behavior, CD/runtime resets, backend reset or preservation by backend type, option fallback binding, mute depth, and volume option binding.
